name: golang-gomega-dev
title: golang-gomega-dev
summary: Matcher/assertion library for the Go programming language
description:
Matcher/assertion library for the Go programming language
Gomega is a matcher/assertion library. It is best paired with the Ginkgo BDD
test framework, but can be adapted for use in other contexts too.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gomega-dev because Matcher/assertion library for the Go programming language.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gomega-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gomega-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gomega-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
